sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67036" key="metaxeima/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεταχειμάζω</orth>, of weather, <sense id="n67036.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be stormy afterwards</tr_>, Veget.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Mil.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.40</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
